overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Harry Potter video game (Hogwarts Legacy) showing a character exploring the Gryffindor common room and tower. The clip features medieval stone architecture, warm candlelit interiors, and transitions from upper corridors down a spiral staircase into the main circular common room.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor tower upper corridor with house banners

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stone corridor, passing framed portraits and house banners

entered.detail: large red and gold banner with Gryffindor name hanging on stone wall
gothic stone archway with carved details
medieval-style iron lantern hanging from ceiling
portrait in ornate frame on stone wall
tufted brown leather sofa against wall
antique wooden chest of drawers with items on top

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow stone corridor in the Gryffindor tower, passing under a large house banner. The walls are adorned with framed portraits and illuminated by hanging lanterns. A leather sofa and wooden chest furnish the passage.

events.description: exits enclosed corridor onto open balcony overlooking the main common room below

agents.ego_description: walking along the balcony railing and looking down at the common room below

entered.detail: stone balustrade with arched openings overlooking the common room
large ornate chandelier with multiple candles hanging from ceiling
large stone fireplace visible on lower level
exposed dark wooden ceiling beams

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a stone balcony overlooking the vast Gryffindor common room below. Large iron chandeliers hang from the wooden beamed ceiling, and a stone fireplace is visible on the lower level. The camera pans to take in the view of the cozy common room.

events.description: leaves the balcony and enters a narrow corridor with wooden lattice screens

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor toward a wooden lattice door

entered.detail: tall wooden screen with geometric lattice pattern
heavy wooden door with iron fittings

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the balcony back into an enclosed corridor featuring decorative wooden lattice screens and a heavy wooden door. The lighting remains warm and ambient from wall sconces.

events.description: reaches bottom of staircase and enters the main common room

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow spiral stone staircase, holding the railing

entered.detail: winding stone staircase with worn steps and wooden handrail
tall narrow gothic window showing dark night outside

segments.scene_description: The character descends a tight spiral stone staircase with a wooden handrail, passing arched windows that reveal the night outside. The stone walls are lit by wall-mounted lanterns as the character spirals downward.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular Gryffindor common room main hall

agents.ego_description: walking around the circular common room, observing the furniture and architecture, passing fireplaces and armchairs

entered.detail: large round room with high vaulted ceiling and wooden beams
large stone fireplace with burning fire
plush red leather armchair near fireplace
tall dark wooden wardrobe with carved details
built-in wooden bookshelves filled with books
large circular clock on stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters the main Gryffindor common room, a large circular space with a high vaulted wooden ceiling, multiple fireplaces, and comfortable leather seating. The character explores the room, passing wooden wardrobes, bookshelves, and a large wall clock, all illuminated by warm firelight and hanging lanterns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the upper reaches of the Gryffindor tower that gradually descends into the expansive warmth of the main common room. It begins in a narrow stone corridor adorned with portraits and house banners, moving past leather furniture and hanging lanterns before emerging onto a balcony overlooking the vast living area below. The camera then retreats from this vantage point through a corridor of decorative wooden lattice screens and a heavy door, leading into a tight spiral stone staircase. As the character descends the stairs, the view shifts from the dark night visible through arched windows to the glowing interior of the lower level. Finally, the scene opens into the large circular common room, where the camera explores a space filled with vaulted wooden ceilings, bookshelves, and multiple fireplaces illuminated by flickering firelight.
